reason: Single project-level character board was generated directly in the parent thread for immediate visual supervision and QC; no background Codex thread was required.

jobs.thread_title: 断航故土 肃明虫族小兵多状态角色板 v01
jobs.history_policy: If future iterations supersede the canonical file, move retained intermediates into project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/history/ with a .vNNN filename suffix.
retry_rules: Retry if the figure becomes a human soldier in insect armor.
Retry if the soldier duplicates Li Tang's commander silhouette or back-rank system.
Retry if the board redesigns the Suming/Qingming emblem or makes it a large badge.
Retry if visible text, labels, UI, or watermark appear.
